name: 03_04_opening_range_breakout_ger40_m5
hypothesis: On GER40 M5, the opening range of the first 30 minutes of the Frankfurt/London session (07:00-07:30 UTC) contains the day's initial liquidity; a breakout beyond that range with ATR-confirmed momentum during 07:30-11:00 UTC yields positive expectancy with trailing exits.

entry_rules.long: trade_session==1 AND close > or_high + 0.25*ATR(14) AND close > ema(50) AND bars_since_trade_open <= 24 AND (or_range/ATR(14)) >= 0.3
entry_rules.short: trade_session==1 AND close < or_low - 0.25*ATR(14) AND close < ema(50) AND bars_since_trade_open <= 24 AND (or_range/ATR(14)) >= 0.3

regime_filter.rule: adx > 18 (require some directional pressure; avoid pure chop)

exit_rules.stop_loss: opposite side of opening range, capped at 1.5*ATR(14)
exit_rules.trailing: after 1.0*ATR profit, trail by 1.0*ATR; force flat at 15:30 UTC

notes: Opening range is session-anchored (not rolling Donchian) to avoid prior dead-branch failure mode. EMA(50) acts as light trend filter, not a strict HTF gate.
